message:
feat(memory): implement CASS-Memory (CM) integration

Adds procedural memory system integration for agent tasks:

- CM client in flywheel-clients with typed CLI access
- CM service in gateway with logging and error handling
- Memory REST routes:
  - POST /memory/context - get rules and history for task
  - GET /memory/quickstart - self-documentation
  - GET /memory/stats - playbook statistics
  - GET /memory/rules - list playbook rules
  - GET /memory/doctor - health diagnostics
  - POST /memory/outcome - record session outcomes
- Unit tests (16 tests, all passing)

Part of bead flywheel_private-imw (CASS and CM Memory System Integration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
